properties.name: text
properties.value: We didn't raise the obelisk. We woke on the floor, and it was already listening.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Once a year the obelisk opens and the stone child speaks a new rule. Once a year we obey.

properties.name: text
properties.value: A baby's face, and no breath behind it. When its mouth opens, the whole Fold goes still.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The unnamed voice is owed to the deep. We all knew at once whose small voice it meant.

properties.name: text
properties.value: It isn't a law. Leaving means admitting there's an up -- and an up means we fell.

properties.name: title
properties.value: The Father Who Would Not Kneel

properties.name: text
properties.value: He didn't dispute the rule when it was read. He started packing a bag for the climb.

properties.name: text
properties.value: She didn't dispute it either. She only asked where a thing could be hidden from the song.

properties.name: text
properties.value: One of us wanted to run. One of us wanted to hide him. He slept between us, owing nothing yet.

properties.name: text
properties.value: No one recalls a year before the rules, or who we were. That became a rule as well.

properties.name: text
properties.value: We marked the lintels so the sea would pass us over. It read the marks as an invitation.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Press your ear to the silt. That is the sound we were all born owing.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Rope enough to reach the light -- if you don't weigh anything anymore.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Every ship that ever sank points the same way. Up.

properties.name: text
properties.value: We aren't climbing toward anything. We're climbing away from a rule. That is enough to move a man.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Little prints on the mast beside mine. He was still with me here. Still with me here.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The ones who climb highest loved least. I am not going to climb well.

properties.name: text
properties.value: When you're turning to salt, it's when you're staring ahead too long.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The foreman covered his ears and ran. He calcified mid-stride, facing away.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Dead ships stand like trees down here. We climb them to feel tall.

properties.name: text
properties.value: If you stack them right, they listen back.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Everyone's shift but mine ends at the sound. I keep counting anyway.

properties.name: text
properties.value: We dug until the rock sang back. We should have dug the other way.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Cross here and the sky remembers you have a face. It does not approve.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The line between worlds is thinner than a footstep. His fit inside mine.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The first breath of surface air burns. The second one is his name.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The scuffle in the mud is two feet, then one, then none. I have read it a hundred times.

properties.name: text
properties.value: I turned for one measure. When I turned back, both of them were gone. She was always so quiet.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Whatever lifted him did not frighten him. He did not cry out. That is the part I cannot forgive.

properties.name: text
properties.value: One set of prints reaches the surface ahead of ours. Small heels. Someone who knew the way out.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Front row, both of us. He said don't blink.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Something came up through the ring floor. The ropes snapped outward when it left with him.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Up here the song is quieter. Not a comfort. It means it already took what it wanted.

properties.name: text
properties.value: He'll take you across for what you love most. Everyone finds they can pay.

properties.name: text
properties.value: They walk IN. Toward the den. Why would he walk toward it?

properties.name: text
properties.value: It doesn't eat what it takes. It collects.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Nailed from the inside. Whatever they feared, they feared it more than the dark.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Someone locked themselves in to transcribe the sound before it finished transcribing them.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The tracks all lead one way and none lead back. That is the only welcome it offers.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The surface does not want you. It has left instructions, in gouges.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Little things, arranged by size. A shoe. A comb. A tooth too small to be yours.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Learn his gait or lose him: paired stride, a heel dot, the faint right-foot drag.

properties.name: text
properties.value: I followed the paired stride a mile before I saw it had no heel dot. A mile.

properties.name: text
properties.value: There is nothing spilled at the den's mouth. I don't know if that is worse.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Beside the small ones, always: a woman's stride. Not chasing. Leading.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The music stops every time the small one cries. Then it starts again, angrier.

properties.name: text
properties.value: She doesn't hunt to kill. She hunts to keep.

properties.name: text
properties.value: It is exactly the size of a boy who stopped growing when the water came.

properties.name: text
properties.value: A mother built it. That is why the bars are padded, and there is no door on the inside.

properties.name: text
properties.value: She didn't outrun the Fold's rule. She outran it all the way here, the child under her coat.

properties.name: text
properties.value: She didn't fight the Conductor. She gave him a reason to keep playing, and took the baton.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Caged, the song can never rewrite him. Kept whole. Kept hers. Call it love if you can.

properties.name: text
properties.value: He erases every attempt except the last row's -- the only players who ever got it right.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Each stopped at the moment a player gave up. He keeps re-conducting those moments.

properties.name: text
properties.value: He's been trying to describe a sound again. When he finds it, it ends -- all of it.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Land the note and it all resolves -- the rule, the song, the cage. Everything gets to rest.
